base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_meat — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Bait / Meat — drops in front of Link. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bait / Meat — drops in front of Link; distracts Moblin/Goriya to trade food for rupees; also blocks Hungry-Goriya
